            \end{leftwordgroup}

    \vspace{1pt} \\

    \begin{leftwordgroup}{DataRow}
        \bitbox{1}[bgcolor=lightcyan]{D} &
        \bitbox{4}[bgcolor=lightgreen]{length: 24} &
        \bitbox{2}{\rotatebox{90}{\tiny fields: 2 }} & 
        \bitbox{25}[bgcolor=lightgray]{} 
        
                \\
        \begin{rightwordgroup}{field 0  \\ oid}
                    \bitbox{4}[bgcolor=lightergreen]{\small length: 4} &
            \bitbox{28}{\small 1862}
                \end{rightwordgroup}
                \\
        \begin{rightwordgroup}{field 1  \\ enumlabel}
                    \bitbox{4}[bgcolor=lightergreen]{\small length: 6} &
            \bitbox{28}{\small YEARLY}
                \end{rightwordgroup}
            \end{leftwordgroup}

    \vspace{1pt} \\

    \begin{leftwordgroup}{DataRow $\times$ 8}
        \wordbox[lrt]{1}{DataRow messages skipped for brevity $\cdots$} \\
        \skippedwords \\
        \wordbox[lrb]{1}{}
    \end{leftwordgroup}

    \vspace{1pt} \\

\begin{leftwordgroup}{CommandComplete}
        \bitbox{1}[bgcolor=lightcyan]{C} &
        \bitbox{4}[bgcolor=lightgreen]{length: 13} &
        \bitbox{27}{SELECT 9} 
    \end{leftwordgroup}
    \vspace{1pt} \\

\begin{leftwordgroup}{ReadyForQuery}
        \bitbox{1}[bgcolor=lightcyan]{Z} &
        \bitbox{4}[bgcolor=lightgreen]{length: 5} &
        \bitbox{27}{\small Idle}
    \end{leftwordgroup}
    \vspace{1pt} \\
\end{bytefield}

\end{document}
